title: Realty Income Announces $1.7 Billion Sale-Leaseback Of Encore Boston Harbor Through Partnership With Wynn Resorts
text: SAN DIEGO, Feb. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Realty Income Corporation (Realty Income, NYSE: O), The Monthly Dividend Company®, announced today that the company has signed a definitive agreement to acquire the Encore Boston Harbor (Encore) Resort and Casino for $1.7 billion under a long-term net lease agreement with Wynn Resorts, Limited (NASDAQ: WYNN). The transaction is Realty Income's first acquisition in the gaming industry.

title: Wynn Resorts, Limited Reports Fourth Quarter and Year End 2021 Results
text: LAS VEGAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Wynn Resorts, Limited (NASDAQ: WYNN) (the "Company") today reported financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2021. Operating revenues were $1.05 billion for the fourth quarter of 2021, an increase of 53.5%, or $367.1 million, from $686.0 million for the fourth quarter of 2020. Net loss attributable to Wynn Resorts, Limited was $177.2 million, or $1.54 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter of 2021, compared to net loss attributable to W

title: Wynn Resorts to Sell the Real Estate of Encore Boston Harbor to Realty Income for $1.70 billion Through a Sale-Leaseback Transaction
text: LAS VEGAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ: WYNN) (“we” or the “Company”) announced today that it has entered into a definitive agreement to sell all of the land and real estate assets of Encore Boston Harbor to Realty Income (NYSE: O) for $1.70 billion in cash, representing a 5.9% cap rate (the “transaction”). Wynn Resorts will continue to operate the property at the five-star standard for which the Company is renowned. Simultaneous with the closing of the transaction, we will enter into

title: Wynn Resorts Achieves Top Rankings on Forbes America's Best Employers List 2022 and U.S. News & World Report's Best Hotels in the U.S.A.
text: LAS VEGAS, Feb. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Wynn Resorts was recently recognized as one of Forbes America's Best Employers 2022, ranking within the Top 5 companies in the Travel and Leisure category. The Company rose an impressive 123 spots on the list from the prior year.

title: Jackpocket Lottery App Teams up with WynnBET Ahead of the Big Game
text: NEW YORK, Feb. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jackpocket, the leading third-party app in the U.S. to provide a secure way to order official state lottery tickets, and WynnBET, the premier online sports betting and casino app from the global leader in luxury hospitality, Wynn Resort, today announced a partnership to deliver exclusive offers to New York State players. The partnership kicks off with a joint "Big Game Big Deal" promotion available immediately in the Jackpocket app.

title: WynnBET Online Sportsbook Launches In Louisiana
text: Wynn Resorts Limited's (NASDAQ: WYNN) online betting app, WynnBET, said its online sports betting platform is live in the state of Louisiana.  For players that are existing Wynn Rewards members, they will be able to connect their Wynn Rewards accounts to WynnBET after completing registration with WynnBET.

title: WynnBET Online & Mobile Sportsbook Launches in Louisiana
text: LAS VEGAS, Feb. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- WynnBET, the online sports betting and casino ("iGaming") app from the global leader in luxury hospitality, Wynn Resorts, announced on Thursday that its online sports betting platform is live in the state of Louisiana. Players in Louisiana can download the mobile app or visit https://la.wynnbet.com/sportsbook to begin wagering.

title: Wynn Resorts' WynnBET Begins Operations In New York
text: Wynn Resorts Ltd (NASDAQ: WYNN) iGaming app WynnBET revealed its online sports betting platform is live in the state of New York. Players in New York can download WynnBET on the Apple App and Google Play Store or visit ny.wynbet.com/sportsbook to begin wagering.

title: WynnBET Online & Mobile Sportsbook Launches in New York
text: LAS VEGAS, Feb. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- WynnBET (Nasdaq: WYNN), the online sports betting and casino ("iGaming") app from the global leader in luxury hospitality, Wynn Resorts, announced on Friday that its online sports betting platform is live in the state of New York. Players in New York can download WynnBET on the Apple App and Google Play Store, or visit https://ny.wynnbet.com/sportsbook to begin wagering.

title: Wynn Resorts Named To FORTUNE Magazine's 2022 World's Most Admired Companies List
text: LAS VEGAS, Feb. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Wynn Resorts was again honored on FORTUNE Magazine's 2022 World's Most Admired Companies list in the hotel, casino and resort category. The Company placed first overall in the group for Quality of Products/Services.

title: See how DraftKings, Caesars and the other major sports-betting stocks performed in January
text: Since the United States Supreme Court struck down the Professional and Amateur Sports Protection Act (PASPA) in 2018, sports-betting companies have surged in popularity. In response, sports betting companies have begun jockeying for bettors in a “gold rush” of customer acquisition.
